description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a vibrant, nautical-themed design with the title 'SEA CRASHERS' displayed prominently on the marquee. The front panel includes a large screen area, a control panel with buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot below. The side panels are decorated with colorful artwork depicting a pirate ship with a skull-and-crossbones sail, floating islands, and a treasure map motif with marked paths and 'X' symbols. The cabinet is primarily painted in shades of blue and aqua, with accents of red and brown, evoking a playful oceanic atmosphere. The back panel is plain black with ventilation slots and access panels. The overall construction appears sturdy, likely made from wood or MDF with a glossy painted finish and some metal and plastic components for controls and hardware.
description: A nautical-themed arcade game cabinet with pirate ship artwork, a large screen, control panel, and coin slot, finished in blue and red tones. The sides feature colorful pirate graphics, while the front displays the 'SEA CRASHERS' marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'SEA CRASHERS' marquee, large screen area, control panel with buttons and joystick, and a coin slot below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pirate ship artwork, floating islands, and treasure map graphics in blue and red hues.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel with ventilation slots and access doors, lacking decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching pirate ship and treasure map graphics.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen area is present but the display type is not visually identifiable; likely flat and rectangular with a visible bezel)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two round buttons, arranged in a simple horizontal row, with a coin slot below; control panel is accented with colored markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'SEA CRASHERS' in bold, stylized letters on a red and brown background, matching the nautical and pirate theme of the cabinet.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are decorated with colorful pirate ship artwork, floating islands, treasure map paths, and 'X' marks, all in a playful, cartoonish style with blue, red, and green tones.
